scripts.import-kan-nashi-raboty-works: docker cp scripts/import-kan-nashi-raboty-works.php wp-new-wordpress:/var/www/html/scripts/ && docker cp kan-data/nashi-raboty-works.json wp-new-wordpress:/var/www/html/scripts/ && docker cp kan-data/created-doctors.json wp-new-wordpress:/var/www/html/scripts/ && docker exec wp-new-wordpress wp eval-file /var/www/html/scripts/import-kan-nashi-raboty-works.php --allow-root
scripts.analyze-price-duplicates-wp: docker cp scripts/analyze-price-duplicates-wp.php wp-new-wordpress:/var/www/html/scripts/ && docker exec wp-new-wordpress wp eval-file /var/www/html/scripts/analyze-price-duplicates-wp.php --allow-root 2>nul && docker cp wp-new-wordpress:/var/www/html/kan-data/price-analysis-wp.json kan-data/
scripts.import-kan-services-prices: docker cp kan-data wp-new-wordpress:/var/www/html/kan-data && docker cp scripts/import-kan-services-prices.php wp-new-wordpress:/var/www/html/scripts/ && docker exec wp-new-wordpress wp eval-file /var/www/html/scripts/import-kan-services-prices.php --allow-root
scripts.migrate-doctor-education: docker cp scripts/. wp-new-wordpress:/var/www/html/scripts/ && docker exec wp-new-wordpress wp eval-file /var/www/html/scripts/migrate-doctor-education.php --allow-root
scripts.remove-review-author-image-meta: docker cp scripts/. wp-new-wordpress:/var/www/html/scripts/ && docker exec wp-new-wordpress wp eval-file /var/www/html/scripts/remove-review-author-image-meta.php --allow-root
scripts.import-kan-doctors-education: docker cp kan-data wp-new-wordpress:/var/www/html/kan-data && docker cp scripts/. wp-new-wordpress:/var/www/html/scripts/ && docker exec wp-new-wordpress wp eval-file /var/www/html/scripts/import-kan-doctors-education.php --allow-root
